testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
01:37:39.659 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.airline.AirlineReservationApplicationTests]: AirlineReservationApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:37:39.872 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.airline.AirlineReservationApplication for test class com.airline.AirlineReservationApplicationTests

'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists bookings cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists flights cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists passengers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists seat_holds cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists seats cascade Hibernate: create table bookings (booking_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, passenger_id bigint not null, seat_id bigint not null unique, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('CONFIRMED','CANCELLED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table flights (arrival_time timestamp(6) not null, departure_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, arrival_airport varchar(255) not null, departure_airport varchar(255) not null, flight_number varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table passengers (id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table seat_holds (active boolean not null, expiration_time timestamp(6) not null, hold_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, seat_id bigint not null, user_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table seats (row_number integer not null, flight_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, fare_class varchar(255) not null check (fare_class in ('ECONOMY','PREMIUM_ECONOMY','BUSINESS','FIRST')), seat_number varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('AVAILABLE','HELD','BOOKED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists bookings add constraint FKdrfy7gcwhtaubn8vgbc4jv989 foreign key (passenger_id) references passengers Hibernate: alter table if exists bookings add constraint FKhmf8yyefriw5ski3jibaua6n foreign key (seat_id) references seats Hibernate: alter table if exists seat_holds add constraint FKsqaitepj3whcje1a3hosqswld foreign key (seat_id) references seats Hibernate: alter table if exists seats add constraint FK8qbyfo5qix0qqg5euuk81qo0p foreign key (flight_id) references flights 2026-03-16T01:37:47.565Z INFO 4231 --- [airline-reservation] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default'
